meaning: n.战斗,格斗v.战斗,搏斗,抗击
examples: It was the end of a long combat.
Over 16 million men had died in combat.
The government is taking action to combat drug abuse.
This year police were determined to combat theft and mounted a specific operation against would-be thieves.
He said that the later governments left it, the harder it would be to combat.
